raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Senate Bill 227 aims to save off-highway vehicle (OHV) competitions in California.",
    "Competition OHVs have been registered through the Red Sticker program under the California Air Resources Board (CARB) for the past two decades.",
    "The Red Sticker program is set to end this year with no plan to replace it.",
    "Without a new program, off-highway vehicle competitions and practice riding on public lands will cease in California.",
    "The cessation of off-highway vehicle competitions will result in significant economic loss for local businesses and competitors.",
    "Funding for environmental work and law enforcement will be lost due to the end of the Red Sticker program."
  ]
}
```
